tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Gb[/ch]    [ch]Fm/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Absus2[/ch]
      [ch]Gm/F[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
      [ch]Am/G[/ch]   [ch]Csus2[/ch]
[ch]Bsus2[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]Gb[/ch]    [ch]Fm/Eb[/ch]  [ch]Absus2[/ch]
      [ch]Gm/F[/ch]   [ch]Bbsus2[/ch]
      [ch]Am/G[/ch]   [ch]Csus2[/ch]
[ch]Bsus2[/ch]

[Chorus 1]
[tab]              [ch]A6[/ch]    [ch]Ab7/Eb[/ch]
Send her your love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#7[/ch]
With a dozen roses[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Make sure that she knows it[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
With a flower from your heart[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]              [ch]A6[/ch]    [ch]Ab7/Eb[/ch]
Show him your love[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#7[/ch]
Don't hold back your feelings[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You don't need a reason[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]D9b5[/ch]  [ch]Eb9[/ch]
When it's straight from the heart[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D6[/ch]                 [ch]G#dim7[/ch]               [ch]C#m7b5[/ch]         [ch]F#7#5[/ch]
I've heard so many say that the days of romance are no more[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]G9[/ch]               [ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]Eb9b5[/ch]
And people falling in love is so old fashioned[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D6[/ch]                   [ch]G#dim7[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7b5[/ch]
But waiting are they the day they once let slip away[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#7#5[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]G9[/ch]                  [ch]C6[/ch]    [ch]B6[/ch]
Hiding need to fulfill their heart's desire for love's pas - sion[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]              [ch]A6[/ch]    [ch]Ab7/Eb[/ch]
Send her your love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]   [ch]F#7[/ch]
With a dozen roses[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
Make sure that she knows it[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
With a flower from your heart[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]              [ch]A6[/ch]    [ch]Ab7/Eb[/ch]
Show him your love[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]    [ch]F#7[/ch]
Don't hold back your feelings[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You don't need a reason[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]D9b5[/ch]  [ch]Eb9b5[/ch]
When it's straight from the heart[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D6[/ch]                 [ch]G#dim7[/ch]                    [ch]C#m7b5[/ch]   [ch]F#7#5[/ch]
I know that people say two hearts beating as one is unreal[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]         [ch]G9[/ch]              [ch]Amaj7[/ch]    [ch]Eb9b5[/ch]
And can only happen in make believe stories[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D6[/ch]                     [ch]G#dim7[/ch]                [ch]C#m7b5[/ch]          [ch]F#7#5[/ch]
But so blind they all must be that they cannot believe what they see[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]G9[/ch]                   [ch]C6[/ch]  [ch]B6[/ch]
For around us are miracles of love's glo - ry[/tab]


[Solo]
[ch]Bb6[/ch]      [ch]A7/E[/ch]
[ch]Abmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G7[/ch]
[ch]Ebm7[/ch]     [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
